headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 29 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 29 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 7 critical, 18 high, 6 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR); plus 22 other bases. 6 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, low cloud base and mist  — most notably around Catania-Fontanarossa (CTA/LICC), London Luton (LTN/EGGW) and Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP). Network hotspots: Catania-Fontanarossa (CTA/LICC), Malta (MLA/LMML), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Birmingham (BHX/EGBB), London Luton (LTN/EGGW) and 24 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, snow / blowing snow and RVR limitations. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 5 airports changed status, led by Malta (MLA/LMML), Beauvais Tillé (BVA/LFOB), EuroAirport Basel–Mulhouse–Freiburg (BSL/LFSB) and 2 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 29 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: snow; cloud base around 300 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 400 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 400 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 200 m, cloud base around 100 ft; forecast below approach minima at times | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: mist; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 500 ft and 19 others. Worst affected now: Catania-Fontanarossa (CTA/LICC) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: operational constraints) | Malta (MLA/LMML) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: operational constraints) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2.5 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Birmingham (BHX/EGBB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: snow; cloud base around 300 ft (drivers: low ceilings, thunderstorm/convective risk, snow/blowing snow) | Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) and 23 others. Changed since last run: Malta (MLA/LMML), Beauvais Tillé (BVA/LFOB), EuroAirport Basel–Mulhouse–Freiburg (BSL/LFSB), Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI), Lyon Saint-Exupéry (LYS/LFLL).
